note: Auxiliary commentary-bucket + gold base compositions merged into COMPOSITION_REGISTRY at load time. data/compositions-v1.json (the citable 11-composition methods-paper registry) is NOT modified.

compositions.name: An = Anum (God List)
compositions.description: Base composition An = Anum (God List), registered (auxiliary, off compositions-v1.json) so ccpo commentary→base edges can resolve their base endpoint. Witnesses are seeded ONLY where a verbatim length-20 chunk co-occurs with a ccpo commentary AND the eBL editorial genre confirms the family.

compositions.name: Commentary on Šumma ālu
compositions.description: Cuneiform commentary tradition (ccpo) on Šumma ālu. Registered as a DISTINCT composition bucket so that verbatim quotations of the base text surface as commentary→base edges in compute_quotation_network (folding into the base would self-loop and vanish). Base composition id: summa_alu.

print_editions.citation: Frahm, E. 2011. Babylonian and Assyrian Text Commentaries. GMTR 5.
print_editions.title: Babylonian and Assyrian Text Commentaries
print_editions.series: Guides to the Mesopotamian Textual Record 5
